flags.message: Walden v. The Heirs of Gratz is an early-1800s Marshall Court merits case (archaic caption, opinion cluster 85157 attached, no cert dates). It reached the Court under pre-1925 mandatory jurisdiction, so a petition grant/deny disposition is anachronistic; this looks like a case the pre-1925 exclusion predicate should drop from the predict matrix.

The snapshot carries no docket entries, no docket number, and no dates (filed/terminated/cert), which is likely why the scope predicates could not classify it as pre-1925. It may be a candidate for probe-recoverability: the linked opinion cluster probably carries the reporter citation and decision date needed to latch predict_excluded.
